name: triko-backend
description: Triko üretim backend'i — Fastify + Prisma (SQLite ile geliştirme, PostgreSQL'e hazır)

scripts.test: DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate >/dev/null && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db ANTHROPIC_API_KEY= tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/api.test.ts test/agent.test.ts test/queue.test.ts test/crawler.test.ts test/preflight.test.ts test/plan.test.ts
